info.name: Tally Prime - Company & Masters API
info.description: Complete API collection for fetching Company information and Master data from Tally Prime via ODBC/XML

body.raw:
<ENVELOPE>
  <HEADER>
    <VERSION>1</VERSION>
    <TALLYREQUEST>Export</TALLYREQUEST>
    <TYPE>Collection</TYPE>
    <ID>CompanyList</ID>
  </HEADER>
  <BODY>
    <DESC>
      <TDL>
        <TDLMESSAGE>
          <COLLECTION NAME="CompanyList">
            <TYPE>Company</TYPE>
            <FETCH>NAME, STARTINGFROM, ENDINGAT, BOOKSDATE, MAILINGNAME, ADDRESS, PHONENO, EMAIL</FETCH>
          </COLLECTION>
        </TDLMESSAGE>
      </TDL>
    </DESC>
  </BODY>
</ENVELOPE>

request.description: Fetch list of all companies with details
Get detailed information for a specific company

body.raw:
<ENVELOPE>
  <HEADER>
    <VERSION>1</VERSION>
    <TALLYREQUEST>Export</TALLYREQUEST>
    <TYPE>Collection</TYPE>
    <ID>VoucherTypes</ID>
  </HEADER>
  <BODY>
    <DESC>
      <STATICVARIABLES>
        <SVCURRENTCOMPANY>M/S. SAHOO SANITARY (2025-26)</SVCURRENTCOMPANY>
      </STATICVARIABLES>
      <TDL>
        <TDLMESSAGE>
          <COLLECTION NAME="VoucherTypesList">
            <TYPE>Voucher Type</TYPE>
            <FETCH>NAME, PARENT, NUMBERINGMETHOD, ISDEEMEDPOSITIVE</FETCH>
          </COLLECTION>
        </TDLMESSAGE>
      </TDL>
    </DESC>
  </BODY>
</ENVELOPE>

request.description: Fetch all voucher types configured in the company

<ENVELOPE>

    <ID>Units</ID>

  <BODY>
    <DESC>
      <STATICVARIABLES>
        <SVCURRENTCOMPANY>M/S. SAHOO SANITARY (2025-26)</SVCURRENTCOMPANY>
      </STATICVARIABLES>
      <TDL>
        <TDLMESSAGE>
          <COLLECTION NAME="UnitsList">
            <TYPE>Unit</TYPE>
            <FETCH>NAME, ISSIMPLEUNIT, BASEUNITS, ADDITIONALUNITS</FETCH>
          </COLLECTION>
        </TDLMESSAGE>
      </TDL>
    </DESC>
  </BODY>
</ENVELOPE>

<ENVELOPE>
  <HEADER>
    <VERSION>1</VERSION>
    <TALLYREQUEST>Export</TALLYREQUEST>
    <TYPE>Collection</TYPE>
    <ID>Currencies</ID>
  </HEADER>
  <BODY>
    <DESC>
      <STATICVARIABLES>
        <SVCURRENTCOMPANY>M/S. SAHOO SANITARY (2025-26)</SVCURRENTCOMPANY>

      <TDL>

</ENVELOPE>
